title: We talk
description: A short call, no pressure. Tell me what you need, and I'll tell you if I'm the right fit, what the project likely involves, and whether it's in the right range.

title: You get a proposal
description: A written plan with exactly what I'll build, when it'll be done, and the flat price. You can ask questions, request changes, or approve it when you're ready.

title: I build it
description: Regular check-ins so you can see progress and give feedback before anything is finalized. No big reveals at the end.

title: Training, docs, and launch
description: Before we go live, I walk you through everything. You get written documentation to keep, and we launch with a clear handoff. If you want ongoing support after that, I offer that too.
